response.justification: Bogdan's resume shows a strong career in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and full-stack web development, but is fundamentally misaligned with this JVM-focused IDE role. Java appears only tangentially (robotic arm work at Altom, brief NI C/C++ IDE work), Kotlin is entirely absent, and there is no evidence of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or any enterprise Java framework experience. The candidate has no demonstrated depth in JVM internals, and the IDE-adjacent experience (NI LabWindows/CVI) was in C, not JVM tooling. While he shows solid engineering discipline and some developer tooling work, the core technical stack required for this role is simply not present.
strengths: Demonstrated software craftsmanship practices: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development across multiple roles
Some developer tooling experience including MCP code generators and open-source framework contributions
Track record with high-scale systems (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Sociomantic) shows ability to work on complex, production-critical infrastructure
concerns: No meaningful Java or Kotlin experience; primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang with Java listed only superficially
Zero exposure to JVM internals, Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or any enterprise Java framework required by the role
No IDE internals experience relevant to JVM tooling; NI LabWindows/CVI work was C-based and brief

key_factors.factor: No Spring or enterprise framework experience
Developer tooling and CI/CD infrastructure experience
